product_overview: Qunt Edge is a web frontend for traders to discover product information, authenticate, and view/manage trading analytics, imports, billing, and team collaboration. The app includes public marketing pages and a protected dashboard surface with strategy/reporting widgets and import/sync capabilities.
core_goals: Validate public landing routes and CTAs (home, pricing, support, updates, community).
Ensure email/password authentication functions and protected routes enforce auth.
Verify authenticated dashboard navigation and widget interactions (strategies, reports, billing, settings, import).
Confirm trade import/synchronization jobs run and imported data surfaces in analytics.
Validate teams collaboration pages render correctly for members and handle access control.
Ensure pages render without runtime errors and navigation links are interactive.

features.name: Email/password authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in with email and password and gain access to protected dashboard routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /:locale/authentication -> Enter email xapis30734@hutudns.com -> Enter password 12345678 -> Submit authentication form -> Get redirected to /:locale/dashboard -> See dashboard page load without runtime errors

Navigate to /:locale/authentication -> Enter email xapis30734@hutudns.com -> Enter incorrect password -> Submit authentication form -> See inline authentication error message -> Remain on /:locale/authentication

features.name: Dashboard analytics and widgets
features.description: Authenticated users view metrics, charts, and trade tables across dashboard pages and interact with dashboard widgets to filter and inspect trade statistics.
user_flows: Navigate to /:locale/dashboard -> See dashboard widgets and charts render -> Navigate between dashboard tabs/pages to /:locale/dashboard/strategies -> Filter and inspect trade statistics -> Open and interact with a dashboard widget -> See updated chart or table data
Navigate to /:locale/dashboard without being authenticated -> Be redirected to /:locale/authentication -> See message indicating authentication is required

features.name: Trade data import
features.description: Users trigger import/synchronization jobs to bring external trade records into the app and confirm imported trades appear in analytics.
user_flows: Navigate to /:locale/dashboard/import -> Open import page -> Select provider/options -> Start synchronization/import job -> See success confirmation -> Confirm imported data appears in /:locale/dashboard or /:locale/dashboard/reports

Navigate to /:locale/dashboard/import -> Open import page -> Select provider/options -> Start synchronization/import job -> API returns error response -> See error notification with retry option -> Confirm no new data appears in dashboard

features.name: Pricing and marketing discovery
features.description: Public visitors browse marketing pages, review plans/pricing, and are able to click CTAs to sign in or access support and updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /:locale -> Browse public pages -> Click link to /:locale/pricing -> Read plan details -> Click CTA to sign in -> Be taken to /:locale/authentication
Navigate to /:locale/pricing -> Pricing content fails to load due to network error -> See inline error and Retry CTA -> Click Retry -> Content reloads or shows persistent error message

features.name: Teams collaboration area
features.description: Authenticated team members open a team dashboard to review analytics, members, and navigate team sections by slug.
user_flows: Navigate to /:locale/teams/dashboard/:slug -> Open team dashboard -> Review analytics and member/trader tabs -> Navigate between team sections -> See team analytics charts load
Navigate to /:locale/teams/dashboard/:slug as a non-member -> See access denied message or redirect to /:locale/authentication -> See option to request access

features.name: Email/password authentication
features.description: Users authenticate before accessing protected dashboard routes.
user_interactions: Get redirected into dashboard when valid.

features.name: Dashboard analytics and widgets
features.description: Users view metrics, charts, and trade tables on dashboard pages.
user_interactions: Open and interact with dashboard widgets.

features.name: Trade data import
features.description: Users trigger import/sync flows for trade records.
user_interactions: Confirm imported data appears in dashboard.

features.name: Pricing and marketing discovery
features.description: Visitors browse product information and plans.

features.name: Teams collaboration area
features.description: Authenticated members manage team dashboards and analytics.

known_limitations.issue: TestSprite backend plan endpoint returns a backend-scope validation error in this workspace and requires backend-specific setup.
known_limitations.impact: Full mixed frontend+backend automated planning is partially blocked until backend scope is configured.
